creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
I believe this port is really an external compiler definition, not really a cross-compiler in the sense that devel/powerpc64-gcc is that targets a specific arch.

Please see the following bugs to illustrate my point that "x" in "xtoolchain" refers to "external" (external to world) not "cross" necessarily:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227920
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227918

I would propose the pkg-descr be changed to state this is an external compiler definition for building FreeBSD base.
